docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TEGADA, PORFIRIA AS TO DEFENDANT PARMALLE, LEEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED JUL-20-2012 TO LEEANNE PARMALLE
